result.markdown: --- title: "Week 6: Functional programming" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Main reference * [9-11. *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/fp.html) ## What you will learn this week * Writing functions * Manipulating functions * Function factories * Functional mapping * Functional adverbs ## Pre-class activities * Watch [Intro to Functional Programming with R](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MuOxlUN9q4E) ## Slides for week Download pdf * [Code used in workshop](week6/lab.R) ` ## Assignments * [Assignment 2](../assignments/A2.qmd) is due on Tuesday 05 May.
